content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

All four amendments identify real, verified bugs. Two (fr-6-ba07be65 and fr-6-a45ac9a6) share the same root cause â€” legacy plan.json backward-compatibility breakage in resolve_bead_plan â€” but describe distinct manifestations and downstream impacts worth tracking separately. The audit-mirroring omission (fr-6-c09a4a4d) is a straightforward consistency bug confirmed by contrasting with every other write path. The crash-window issue (fr-6-002789ad) is a genuine durability defect with a clear fix using the existing but unused plan_hash field in StoredPlanShape.

## Votes

- `fr-6-ba07be65`: Accept
  Verified against source. `proposal_matches_bead_id` (line 826) rejects `explicit_id != Some(true)`, which excludes `None`. `proposal_is_title_fallback_candidate` (line 844) requires both `explicit_id` and `bead_id` to be `None`, or `explicit_id == Some(false)` â€” neither matches the legacy case of `(explicit_id: None, bead_id: Some(...))`. The silent degradation to `membership_confirmed: false` is confirmed. The proposed fix â€” adding a branch for `explicit_id.is_none()` with an implicit-slot bead_id â€” is targeted and backward-compatible.
- `fr-6-c09a4a4d`: Accept
  Verified against source. `sync_project_prompt_hash` (lines 237-260) writes to `FileSystem::project_root()` via `write_atomic` but omits the `mirror_project_file` call. In contrast, `replace_prompt_atomically` (line 334), `revert_prompt_replacement` (line 373), and `create_project` (line 952) all mirror project.toml to the audit workspace after writing. The omission breaks the live/audit consistency invariant for `prompt_hash`. The fix is a single `mirror_project_file` call.
- `fr-6-a45ac9a6`: Accept
  Shares the same root cause as fr-6-ba07be65 but adds distinct value: it traces the impact through `handle_create_from_bead` (lines 298-319), showing that `flow_override` falls back to `default_flow` (line 311), `plan_hash` becomes `None` (line 314-315), and `plan_version` becomes `None` (line 317-318). The reproduction case (legacy plan with `bead_id = "ms-alpha.bead-2"` and `flow_override = "docs_change"` producing `quick_dev` with no metadata) documents a concrete user-visible regression. Accepting both amendments ensures the downstream impact is addressed, not just the matcher logic.
- `fr-6-002789ad`: Accept
  Verified against source. `persist_plan_locked()` writes plan files at lines 642-644 before `status.json` at line 659, creating a real crash window. `plan_shape_matches()` (lines 696-717) reads `plan.json` from disk without verifying it corresponds to the committed snapshot, so a stray plan from a partial write can trick it into returning `true` and skipping `clear_task_run_lineage()`. The `StoredPlanShape.plan_hash` field (line 221) is written but never read â€” using it (or `snapshot.plan_hash`) to gate shape comparison is the correct fix to prevent stale progress attachment.
